class.name: predictive_controller/NoopEffortController
class.description: Minimal controller that claims effort interfaces and writes zero commands.

class.name: predictive_controller/CartesianImpedanceController
class.description: Cartesian impedance controller using pinocchio dynamics and target topics.

class.name: predictive_controller/ResidualObserverController
class.description: Cartesian impedance controller with residual-based external wrench observer.

class.name: predictive_controller/CerebellumPredictiveController
class.description: Cartesian impedance controller with residual observer and cerebellum-style feedforward.

class.name: predictive_controller/PoseBroadcaster
class.description: Publishes current end-effector pose to current_pose.
